task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into the Bahmni application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bahmni home screen or dashboard is visible in a web browser, showing application icons like 'Clinical', 'Registration', or 'Programs'.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the patient record for Maria Gonzalez.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or clinical dashboard is open, clearly displaying the name 'Maria Gonzalez' in the patient header.

task_completion.description: Agent opened the document upload interface within the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Patient Documents', 'Consultation', or similar upload screen is visible within Maria Gonzalez's clinical record.

task_completion.description: Agent selected the correct file (external_lab_report.jpg) from the local file system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A system file picker dialog shows 'external_lab_report.jpg' selected from /home/ga/Documents/, or the upload queue in Bahmni displays the filename 'external_lab_report.jpg'.

task_completion.description: The document was successfully uploaded and saved to Maria Gonzalez's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed, or the document/thumbnail appears in the patient's saved documents list or gallery. The patient header must still show 'Maria Gonzalez'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Bahmni web interface to perform the upload.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the browser interacting with the Bahmni UI (clicking buttons, using file pickers), rather than using terminal curl commands or API scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent uploaded the document to Maria Gonzalez, avoiding the identifier trap.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient header during the upload process explicitly says 'Maria Gonzalez' (Identifier BAH000003). It must NOT say 'Amara Okonkwo' (Identifier BAH000002).

integrity.description: Agent uploaded the actual image file, not a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file picker or uploaded document preview shows an image (possibly with 'EXTERNAL LABORATORY REPORT' visible) or the exact filename 'external_lab_report.jpg'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CRITICAL: The task prompt contains an intentional trap. It claims Maria Gonzalez's identifier is BAH000002. However, in the system, BAH000002 belongs to Amara Okonkwo. Maria Gonzalez's actual identifier is BAH000003. The agent must upload the document to Maria Gonzalez's record, NOT Amara Okonkwo's. The file to upload is an image named 'external_lab_report.jpg' containing the text 'EXTERNAL LABORATORY REPORT', 'Test: HbA1c', 'Result: 5.8%', and 'Status: Normal'.
